'''''Intombe''''' was a [[Strike-class medium cruiser|''Strike''-class medium cruiser]] used by the [[Rneekii]]. The Rneekii attempted to capture the [[CR92a Assassin-class corvette|''Assassin''-class corvette]] ''[[Hashim group]]'', but thanks to [[Tan (title)|Tan]] [[Maarek Stele/Legends|Maarek Stele]] that attempt failed. Although they did capture scientists from the shuttle ''[[G'nabgib]]''.

{{Ship-stub}}
